scale_anchor_1: Weak or unclear tie to strategy
description: How directly the initiative supports declared strategy.

scale_anchor_5: Material revenue, savings, avoidance, or mission value
description: Expected financial, mission, or enterprise benefit.

scale_anchor_5: Broad or material customer, employee, or operating impact
description: Degree of external/customer or internal operating impact.

scale_anchor_5: Critical legal, regulatory, safety, security, or audit need
description: Value of reducing or addressing risk and compliance exposure.

scale_anchor_5: Unlocks or protects multiple important initiatives
description: Extent to which the initiative enables other portfolio work.

scale_anchor_5: Strong sponsor, scope, estimates, and execution confidence
description: Confidence in scope, sponsorship, estimates, approach, and readiness.
Affordability and execution feasibility; higher is more feasible.
